# Job 13

## Verses (28)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Truly, my eye has seen all this, word of it has come to my ear, and I have knowledge of it. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | The same things are in my mind as in yours; I am equal to you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | But I would have talk with the Ruler of all, and my desire is to have an argument with God. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | But you put a false face on things; all your attempts to put things right are of no value. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | If only you would keep quiet, it would be a sign of wisdom! | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | Give ear to the argument of my mouth, and take note of the words of my lips. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | Will you say in God's name what is not right, and put false words into his mouth? | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Will you have respect for God's person in this cause, and put yourselves forward as his supporters? | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | Will it be good for you to be searched out by him, or have you the thought that he may be guided into error like a man? | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | He will certainly put you right, if you have respect for persons in secret. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | Will not his glory put you in fear, so that your hearts will be overcome before him? | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | Your wise sayings are only dust, and your strong places are only earth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | Keep quiet, and let me say what is in my mind, whatever may come to me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | I will take my flesh in my teeth, and put my life in my hand. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | Truly, he will put an end to me; I have no hope; but I will not give way in argument before him; | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | And that will be my salvation, for an evil-doer would not come before him, | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | Give ear with care to my words, and keep what I say in your minds. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | See now, I have put my cause in order, and I am certain that I will be seen to be right. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | Is any one able to take up the argument against me? If so, I would keep quiet and give up my breath. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | Only two things do not do to me, then I will come before your face: | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | Take your hand far away from me; and let me not be overcome by fear of you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | Then at the sound of your voice I will give answer; or let me put forward my cause for you to give me an answer. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | What is the number of my evil-doings and my sins? give me knowledge of them. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | Why is your face veiled from me, as if I was numbered among your haters? | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | Will you be hard on a leaf in flight before the wind? will you make a dry stem go more quickly on its way? | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | For you put bitter things on record against me, and send punishment on me for the sins of my early years; | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
| [27](BBE.md#v27) | And you put chains on my feet, watching all my ways, and making a limit for my steps; | [WEB](WEB.md#v27) · [KJV](KJV.md#v27) · [ASV](ASV.md#v27) |
| [28](BBE.md#v28) | Though a man comes to nothing like a bit of dead wood, or like a robe which has become food for the worm. | [WEB](WEB.md#v28) · [KJV](KJV.md#v28) · [ASV](ASV.md#v28) |
